## Meeting Purpose

[To guide Jürgen on preparing for the upcoming Vappy client meeting, focusing on content strategy and Airtable setup.](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Time constraints require focusing on directional strategy and quick wins rather than comprehensive competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Marcel's expertise should be leveraged for deep industry knowledge and meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Airtable setup should prioritize a single, flexible base table for assignments, with views for different data representations](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [The meeting should emphasize learnings, key questions, and directional strategy to inform future content focus](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

## Topics

### Project Timeline and Preparation

  - [Vappy project kicked off on Thursday, shorter prep time than usual week-and-a-half](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Focus on directional strategy, topic clusters, and refining thinking for content OS and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim for quick wins and immediate fixable issues due to time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Airtable Setup and Data Management

  - [Shift towards using a single base table ("All Records") for assignments in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Import data from SEMrush competitive gap analysis after running assignment creation and clustering workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Use views, filters, and groupings to represent data in various ways for the client](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Key columns: cluster, assignment name, keyword, search volume, description, brief, competitive URL](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Meeting Preparation and Agenda

  - [Follow similar agenda to previous sessions (e.g., Abnormal, Run Popper)](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Present takeaways from kickoff call, key topic opportunities, and directional strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Get feedback to inform content OS and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Prioritize thinking and strategy over perfecting Airtable presentation](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### Leveraging Resources

  - [Use Marcel's deep industry knowledge; schedule a prep call ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Reference older instructional videos for competitor gap analysis process](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Utilize ChatGPT for data merging and step-by-step guidance on technical tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Ep6XC39QfP5uMHoLyPjdcs7b7ztsigWS?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
